name: fancy-ui
description: Browse, search, and install Fancy UI components conversationally, and build Human+ UX apps where agents share the UI. Bundles the hosted registry MCP + skills.

interface.shortDescription: Registry MCP and skills for Fancy UI.
interface.longDescription: Find, install, and compose Fancy UI components through the hosted registry MCP, then build Human+ UX applications where humans and agents share the same UI surface.
defaultPrompt: Find the right Fancy UI components for this app.
Design this interface with Fancy UI.
Make this Fancy UI surface agent-driveable.
